landing.title: Vimcal | Fastest Calendar for People with Too Many Meetings
landing.text:
Vimcal | Fastest Calendar for People with Too Many Meetings
Pricing
For Executive Assistants
Try for free
The calendar for people with too many meetings
Vimcal is the world’s fastest calendar, beautifully designed for people who run the world’s busiest schedules.
Try for free
*No credit card required
Trusted by Founders, Execs, and EAs at
Features
The fastest way
to share availabilities
Sharing booking links is awkward. Typing out your availabilities is tedious.  Vimcal gives you the best of both worlds.
01
just type it, and it’s scheduled
Artfully intelligent scheduling
AI that you can trust with your most important meetings.
Try Vimcal AI
02
Built for efficiency
No more mental math for time zones
See overlapping work hours with anyone in any time zone.
Try Time Travel
03
Instant speed & shortcuts
Lightning fast everything
Vimcal has instant response times (<100ms)  and shortcuts for everything.
Try Calendar Shortcuts
Are you an
Executive Assistant?
The full power of Vimcal – purpose-built for Executive Assistants.
Take me to Vimcal EA
Additional features
Even more to love
Thoughtful details that make every part of your day easier
Tags and Metrics
Automatically color code your events based on keywords and see a breakdown of how you spend your time.
One view to rule them all
Coordinate across all work and personal accounts, in one unified calendar. No more flipping tabs and booking on the wrong account.
Be a better people person
See social profiles and company dossiers for everyone you meet with, so you can be on top of your game.
Do Not Disturb Mode
Transform your calendar with a backdrop, pomodoro timer, and ambient sounds — welcome to Focus Mode.
The best mobile calendar
Easily schedule across time zones, share your availability, and stay connected — all on the go.
Color code your tags and metrics
Automatically color code your events based on keywords and see a breakdown of how you spend your time.
One view to rule them all
Coordinate across all work and personal accounts, in one unified calendar. No more flipping tabs and booking on the wrong account.
Be a better people person
See social profiles and company dossiers for everyone you meet with, so you can be on top of your game.
Do Not Disturb Mode
Transform your calendar with a backdrop, pomodoro timer, and ambient sounds — welcome to Focus Mode.
The best mobile calendar
Easily schedule across time zones, share your availability, and stay connected — all on the go.
testimonials
What customers are saying...
"Been using Vimcal for a few months now and love it! This has saved me at least 20 mins a day!"
Prukalpa
CEO, ATLAN
"Vimcal, call it Superhuman for calendar, new favorite productivity tool."
Dick Costolo
Former CEO, Twitter
"I just got onboarded to Vimcal and I'm blown away. Easily the best calendar I've used. They've also solved the awkward calendly link handoff."
Alex MacCaw
Founder, Reflect & Clearbit
"Let me put this out. Vimcal is KING I just started using since yesterday and I've already used it 2 times to schedule biz meetings and it's removed all the hassle I have with timezones, availability and custom schedules and more I'm blown away. Hat's off "
Amaanath
Digital Marketing Generalist

Frequently
Asked Questions
Does Vimcal work with Google Calendar and Outlook?
Yes, Vimcal syncs seamlessly with both. Many of our customers use Vimcal to see both their GCal and Outlook calendars in one unified view.
Who is Vimcal built for?
Vimcal is designed for founders, executives, VCs, and anyone who regularly has a high volume of meetings.
What’s the difference between Vimcal and Vimcal EA?
Vimcal is an ultra-fast personal calendar for founders, execs, and ICs. Vimcal EA is built specifically for Executive Assistants who schedule a high volume of meetings for their execs.
Do I need to download anything?
You can use Vimcal directly in your browser or download the desktop and mobile apps for an even faster experience.
What makes Vimcal different from other calendars?
Vimcal is built for speed, aesthetics, and precision. Every action related from scheduling to availability sharing is optimized to take seconds instead of minutes.
Is there a free trial?
Yes, you can experience Vimcal before subscribing. No credit card details needed!
How much does Vimcal cost?
Vimcal starts at $20/month or $200/year after your trial period.
Can I use Vimcal for my whole team?
Yes. Vimcal works best for teams and enterprises as we have an abundance of  collaborative features.
My IT department is strict, will they let me use this?
We serve Fortune 500 companies, major financial institutions, and other highly regulated organizations. Our platform meets rigorous enterprise security standards such as GDPR compliance, annual third-party audits, and industry-leading certifications like ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and HIPAA.
Hello, from the
world's most beautiful calendar
.
Try for free
*No credit card required

Vimcal
EA

pricing.text:
Vimcal & Vimcal EA Pricing | Calendar Software Plans
Pricing
For Executive Assistants
Try for free
Pricing
Choose the right plan for you
VIMCAL
VIMCAL EA
Vimcal is a powerful calendar that serves the majority of the organization, helping busy professionals and teams schedule meetings both internally and externally.
Monthly
Yearly
(Save up to 33%)
iOS Only
Free
Schedule on the go
Features include:
iOS Calendar
Drag and copy availabilities
Multi-time zone conversion
Auto-merge duplicate events
Dark mode
Get the app
iOS & Desktop
$20
/ month
$16.67
/ month
The full experience
Everything in Vimcal iOS, plus:
Unlimited Personal Booking Links
Polls for group scheduling
Vimcal Desktop App for Mac and PC
Team scheduling features
Custom Menu Bar App for Mac
Remove 'Created with Vimcal signature in events
Try for free
most popular
Enterprise
Let's Chat
Explore what's best for your team
Everything in Vimcal iOS & Desktop, plus:
Dedicated support manager
SAML SSO
Advanced security and controls
Custom billing
Contact Us
Vimcal EA is an advanced tier of Vimcal, designed specifically for Executive Assistants.
It includes all of Vimcal’s functionality, with additional features for delegated scheduling.
Monthly
Yearly
(Save up to 33%)
EA Scheduling
$75
/ month
$62.50
/ month
All the power of Vimcal, purpose-built for EAs
Everything in Vimcal iOS & Desktop, plus:
Support for 5 simultaneous time zones
Auto-created and auto-deleted Calendar Holds
Polls and Collaborative Spreadsheets for large meetings
History of previously offered time slots
Calendar Audits and Weekly Calendar Metrics
Customizable preferences for each exec
One-click account handoff to another EA
1-on-1 onboardings

Frequently
Asked Questions
Does Vimcal work with Google Calendar and Outlook?
Yes, Vimcal syncs seamlessly with both. Many of our customers use Vimcal to see both their GCal and Outlook calendars in one unified view.
Who is Vimcal built for?
Vimcal is designed for founders, executives, VCs, and anyone who regularly has a high volume of meetings.
What’s the difference between Vimcal and Vimcal EA?
Vimcal is an ultra-fast personal calendar for founders, execs, and ICs. Vimcal EA is built specifically for Executive Assistants who schedule a high volume of meetings for their execs.
Do I need to download anything?
You can use Vimcal directly in your browser or download the desktop and mobile apps for an even faster experience.
What makes Vimcal different from other calendars?
Vimcal is built for speed, aesthetics, and precision. Every action related from scheduling to availability sharing is optimized to take seconds instead of minutes.
Is there a free trial?
Yes, you can experience Vimcal before subscribing. No credit card details needed!
How much does Vimcal cost?
Vimcal starts at $20/month or $200/year after your trial period.
Can I use Vimcal for my whole team?
Yes. Vimcal works best for teams and enterprises as we have an abundance of  collaborative features.
My IT department is strict, will they let me use this?
We serve Fortune 500 companies, major financial institutions, and other highly regulated organizations. Our platform meets rigorous enterprise security standards such as GDPR compliance, annual third-party audits, and industry-leading certifications like ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and HIPAA.
Hello, from the
world's most beautiful calendar
.

*No credit card required

analysis.name: Vimcal
analysis.tagline: The calendar for people with too many meetings
analysis.value_proposition: A keyboard-first, ultra-fast calendar built for founders, executives, and EAs who need to schedule at high volume across time zones with minimal friction.
analysis.ideal_customer: Founders, executives, VCs, and Executive Assistants who run high-volume meeting schedules and need speed, timezone handling, and availability sharing

features.name: personal booking links
features.description: Unlimited shareable booking links so recipients can self-schedule without back-and-forth
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited Personal Booking Links

features.name: availability sharing (drag and copy)
features.description: Drag to select time slots and copy them as text for pasting into messages
features.evidence_quote: Drag and copy availabilities

features.name: ai scheduling
features.description: AI that interprets natural language to schedule meetings intelligently
features.evidence_quote: Artfully intelligent scheduling. AI that you can trust with your most important meetings.

features.name: time travel (multi-timezone viewer)
features.description: Visualize overlapping working hours between people in different time zones
features.evidence_quote: No more mental math for time zones. See overlapping work hours with anyone in any time zone.

features.name: multi-time zone conversion
features.description: Convert and display events across multiple time zones simultaneously
features.evidence_quote: Multi-time zone conversion

features.name: 5-timezone simultaneous view (ea)
features.description: Support for displaying 5 simultaneous time zones — EA-only feature
features.evidence_quote: Support for 5 simultaneous time zones

features.name: keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Comprehensive keyboard shortcuts for nearly every calendar action
features.evidence_quote: Vimcal has instant response times (<100ms) and shortcuts for everything.

features.name: sub-100ms response time
features.description: UI engineered for instant response, claimed <100ms for all actions
features.evidence_quote: Vimcal has instant response times (<100ms) and shortcuts for everything.

features.name: tags and metrics
features.description: Auto-color-code events by keyword tags and view time-spent breakdowns by category
features.evidence_quote: Automatically color code your events based on keywords and see a breakdown of how you spend your time.

features.name: unified multi-account calendar view
features.description: See all work and personal calendars in one view without switching tabs or accounts
features.evidence_quote: Coordinate across all work and personal accounts, in one unified calendar. No more flipping tabs.

features.name: contact dossiers
features.description: Surfaces social profiles and company information for meeting attendees inline
features.evidence_quote: See social profiles and company dossiers for everyone you meet with, so you can be on top of your game.

features.name: focus mode / do not disturb
features.description: Full-screen focus mode with backdrop, pomodoro timer, and ambient sounds
features.evidence_quote: Transform your calendar with a backdrop, pomodoro timer, and ambient sounds — welcome to Focus Mode.

features.name: pomodoro timer
features.description: Built-in pomodoro timer accessible from within the focus/DND mode
features.evidence_quote: Transform your calendar with a backdrop, pomodoro timer, and ambient sounds — welcome to Focus Mode.

features.name: ambient sounds
features.description: Ambient background audio available during focus mode sessions
features.evidence_quote: Transform your calendar with a backdrop, pomodoro timer, and ambient sounds — welcome to Focus Mode.

features.evidence_quote: iOS Calendar

features.evidence_quote: Vimcal Desktop App for Mac and PC

features.evidence_quote: Custom Menu Bar App for Mac

differentiators: World's fastest calendar — <100ms response times for all actions
Keyboard shortcuts for every action (vim-inspired speed)
Time Travel: visual overlapping timezone viewer without mental math
Vimcal EA: dedicated product for Executive Assistants with delegated scheduling
Solves 'awkward Calendly link handoff' with hybrid booking-link + copy-availability approach
Auto-created/auto-deleted calendar holds during scheduling (EA tier)
Beautiful design combined with speed — positioned as 'Superhuman for calendar'
Unified multi-account view across Google Calendar and Outlook in one pane

praised: Time savings — 'This has saved me at least 20 mins a day!' (Prukalpa, CEO Atlan)
Solved booking link awkwardness — 'They've also solved the awkward calendly link handoff.' (Alex MacCaw, Founder Clearbit)
Timezone handling — 'removed all the hassle I have with timezones, availability and custom schedules' (Amaanath)
Team buy-in — 'I bought it for my whole team. Crazy that such a small team built such a usable tool.' (Zach Ware)
Overall quality — 'Easily the best calendar I've used.' (Alex MacCaw)
Positioned alongside top productivity tools — 'Superhuman for calendar' (Dick Costolo, former CEO Twitter)

free_tier.limits: iOS only; no desktop, no booking links, no team features

tiers.name: Free (iOS Only)
tiers.headline_inclusions: iOS app, drag-copy availabilities, multi-timezone conversion, auto-merge duplicates, dark mode

tiers.name: iOS & Desktop
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full desktop+iOS app, unlimited booking links, polls, team scheduling, Mac menu bar, no branding

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in iOS & Desktop plus dedicated support manager, SAML SSO, advanced security, custom billing

tiers.name: EA Scheduling
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Vimcal features plus 5-timezone view, calendar holds, audit/metrics, per-exec prefs, EA handoff, 1:1 onboarding

tiers.name: EA Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in EA Scheduling plus dedicated support manager, SAML SSO, advanced security, custom billing

pricing.notes: Pricing page advertises 'Save up to 33%' for yearly billing but calculated savings on visible tiers are ~17%. FAQ states '$20/month or $200/year'. EA tier is a separate product line, not just a seat add-on. No explicit seat minimums stated publicly.
